name: What if symptoms from work dust show up 10 years later like silicosis?
description: Claim from diagnosis date despite latency.[2]

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms from work dust show up 10 years later like silicosis?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claim from diagnosis date despite latency.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**File upon diagnosis**—statutes start from discovery in Utah/Idaho for latent occupational diseases.[2]

Long latency common; back pay from disability onset.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Continuous employment proof
- Progressive disease evidence
- No intervening causes

**Practical guidance:** Reconstruct exposure timeline; expert links it.
Delayed claims valid.
